tool_uses.name: Agent
tool_uses.input:
{"description": "Read all crate Cargo.toml files", "subagent_type": "Explore", "prompt": "Read the Cargo.toml AND lib.rs (or main.rs) for each of these crates to understand what they do. For each crate, give me a 1-2 sentence summary of its purpose based on the code and docs:

- rust/crates/tools/Cargo.toml
- rust/crates/plugins/Cargo.toml
- rust/crates/compat-harness/Cargo.toml
- rust/crates/mock-anthropic-service/Cargo.toml
- rust/crates/runtime/Cargo.toml
- rust/crates/rusty-claude-cli/Cargo.toml
- rust/crates/api/Cargo.toml
- rust/crates/commands/Cargo.toml
- rust/crates/telemetry/Cargo.toml

Thoroughness: medium. Report concisely."}
